```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(forecast)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
```
```{r}
INPUT_FILE <- "../../data/processed/merged_features_weekly.parquet"
FREQ       <- 52
ALPHA      <- 0.05

calc_smape <- function(actual, pred) {
  mean(200 * abs(actual - pred) / (abs(actual) + abs(pred)), na.rm = TRUE)
}
```
```{r}
df <- arrow::read_parquet(INPUT_FILE) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  arrange(date)

if (!"target_was_missing" %in% names(df)) df$target_was_missing <- 0L

commodities <- unique(df$commodity)
```
```{r}
all_results <- list()
all_models  <- list()
all_preds   <- list()

for (comm in commodities) {
  sub <- df %>% filter(commodity == comm) %>% arrange(date)

  train_df <- sub %>% filter(split == "train") %>% drop_na(target_price)
  test_df  <- sub %>% filter(split == "test")  %>% drop_na(target_price)

  if (nrow(train_df) < FREQ * 2 || nrow(test_df) == 0) next

  n_test   <- nrow(test_df)
  train_ts <- ts(train_df$target_price, frequency = FREQ)
  real_idx <- test_df$target_was_missing == 0

  model_add <- tryCatch(ets(train_ts, model = "AAA", damped = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  pred_add  <- if (!is.null(model_add)) as.numeric(forecast(model_add, h = n_test)$mean) else rep(NA, n_test)

  model_mult <- NULL
  pred_mult  <- rep(NA, n_test)
  if (!any(train_df$target_price <= 0, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    model_mult <- tryCatch(ets(train_ts, model = "MAM", damped = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(model_mult)) pred_mult <- as.numeric(forecast(model_mult, h = n_test)$mean)
  }

  model_ets <- tryCatch(ets(train_ts, model = "ZZZ"), error = function(e) NULL)
  pred_ets  <- if (!is.null(model_ets)) as.numeric(forecast(model_ets, h = n_test)$mean) else rep(NA, n_test)
  ets_label <- if (!is.null(model_ets)) paste0("ETS (", model_ets$method, ")") else "ETS (auto)"

  pred_df <- tibble(date = test_df$date, actual = test_df$target_price,
                    was_missing = test_df$target_was_missing,
                    additive = pred_add, multiplicative = pred_mult, ets_auto = pred_ets)

  smape_add  <- if (!is.null(model_add))  round(calc_smape(pred_df$actual[real_idx], pred_df$additive[real_idx]), 4) else NA
  smape_mult <- if (!is.null(model_mult)) round(calc_smape(pred_df$actual[real_idx], pred_df$multiplicative[real_idx]), 4) else NA
  smape_ets  <- if (!is.null(model_ets))  round(calc_smape(pred_df$actual[real_idx], pred_df$ets_auto[real_idx]), 4) else NA

  models_fitted <- list(
    "HW Additive (AAA)" = model_add,
    "HW Multiplicative (MAM)" = model_mult
  )
  models_fitted[[ets_label]] <- model_ets

  results <- tibble(
    commodity = comm,
    model = c("HW Additive (AAA)", "HW Multiplicative (MAM)", ets_label),
    sMAPE = c(smape_add, smape_mult, smape_ets)
  ) %>% filter(!is.na(sMAPE))

  pred_cols <- c("additive", "multiplicative", "ets_auto")
  names(pred_cols) <- c("HW Additive (AAA)", "HW Multiplicative (MAM)", ets_label)

  all_results[[comm]] <- results
  all_models[[comm]]  <- models_fitted
  all_preds[[comm]]   <- list(df = pred_df, col_map = pred_cols)
}

results_df <- bind_rows(all_results)
```
```{r}
cat("\n", strrep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("  ALL HOLT-WINTERS / ETS MODELS — sMAPE\n")
cat(strrep("=", 60), "\n")
print(results_df, n = Inf)
```
```{r}
best_df <- results_df %>%
  group_by(commodity) %>%
  slice_min(sMAPE, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

cat("\n", strrep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("  BEST MODEL PER COMMODITY (by sMAPE)\n")
cat(strrep("=", 60), "\n")
print(best_df, n = Inf)
```
```{r}
cat("\n  Residual diagnostics for best models:\n\n")

for (i in seq_len(nrow(best_df))) {
  comm       <- best_df$commodity[i]
  best_model <- best_df$model[i]
  model_obj  <- all_models[[comm]][[best_model]]

  cat(strrep("-", 50), "\n")
  cat("  ", comm, "—", best_model, "\n")
  cat(strrep("-", 50), "\n")

  resid_clean <- as.numeric(residuals(model_obj))
  resid_clean <- resid_clean[!is.na(resid_clean)]

  lb <- Box.test(resid_clean, lag = 10, type = "Ljung-Box")
  cat(sprintf("  Ljung-Box(10) p-value: %.4f %s\n", lb$p.value,
              ifelse(lb$p.value > ALPHA, "✓", "✗")))

  if (length(resid_clean) <= 5000) {
    nt <- shapiro.test(resid_clean)
    cat(sprintf("  Shapiro-Wilk p-value:  %.4f %s\n", nt$p.value,
                ifelse(nt$p.value > ALPHA, "✓", "✗")))
  }
  cat("\n")
}
```
```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
plots <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(best_df))) {
  comm       <- best_df$commodity[i]
  best_model <- best_df$model[i]
  best_smape <- best_df$sMAPE[i]

  sub      <- df %>% filter(commodity == comm) %>% arrange(date)
  train_df <- sub %>% filter(split == "train") %>% drop_na(target_price)

  cutoff     <- max(train_df$date) - 365 * 2
  train_plot <- train_df %>% filter(date >= cutoff)

  pred_info <- all_preds[[comm]]
  pred_col  <- pred_info$col_map[[best_model]]
  test_plot <- pred_info$df %>% select(date, actual, pred = all_of(pred_col))

  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = train_plot, aes(x = date, y = target_price),
              color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_line(data = test_plot, aes(x = date, y = actual, color = "Actual"),
              linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_line(data = test_plot, aes(x = date, y = pred, color = "Forecast"),
              linewidth = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Actual" = "#2c3e50", "Forecast" = "#e74c3c"), name = NULL) +
    labs(title = comm,
         subtitle = sprintf("%s  |  sMAPE = %.2f", best_model, best_smape),
         x = NULL, y = "Price") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12), legend.position = "bottom")

  plots[[i]] <- p
}

if (length(plots) > 0) {
  combined <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2) +
    plot_annotation(title = "Holt-Winters / ETS — Best Model Forecast vs Actual",
                    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)))
  print(combined)
}
```
